MeasurementToolMetadata.Notes: We did not include summary scores due to the complexity of substance use and the lack of participants who have used each drug.
MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: This is a survey about your use of drugs and alcohol. The survey should take 5 to 10 minutes. Drug use is, of course, a sensitive and personal matter, something you would not want to tell just anyone about. This survey, however, allows us to ask you about your drug use and guarantees the secrecy of your responses. Let us know at the end what you think. The survey is easy to take. To answer a question, all you need to do is select the appropriate response on the screen.

substance_practice_age.Description: There are two types of questions on this test. The first question "How old are you" is an example of the first type of question. In this type of question, you answer by selecting one of the responses. Go ahead now and answer the question by selecting your age.

substance_practice_fam___1.Description: For this next question, "Which of the following are in your family?", we want you to select all the responses that are true. Which of the following are you in a family? [Father]

substance_practice_fam___2.Description: Which of the following are in your family? [Mother]

substance_practice_fam___3.Description: Which of the following are in your family? [Sister]

substance_practice_fam___4.Description: Which of the following are in your family? [Brother]

substance_practice_fam___5.Description: Which of the following are in your family? [Dog]

substance_practice_fam___6.Description: Which of the following are in your family? [Cat]

substance_tob_010.Description: Have you ever used tobacco (for example cigarettes, cigars, chewing tobacco)?

Levels.2: I have never tried tobacco, but might sometime
Levels.3: I have tried tobacco, but have not used it in the past 12 months
Levels.4: I have tried tobacco, but have used it only once in a while in the past 12 months
Levels.5: I have tried tobacco, and have used it a lot in the past 12 months

substance_tob_020___1.Description: How have you used tobacco? Select all that apply. [Smoked cigarettes]

substance_tob_020___2.Description: How have you used tobacco? Select all that apply. [Smoked a pipe or cigar]

substance_tob_020___3.Description: How have you used tobacco? Select all that apply. [Chewed tobacco or snuff]

substance_tob_030.Description: How have you used tobacco most?

substance_tob_040.Description: How old were you when you first tried more than a small amount of tobacco (at least a full cigarette, cigar, packet or pinch of snuff, chewing tobacco)?

substance_tob_060.Description: During the past 12 months, how often did you smoke cigarettes?

substance_tob_070.Description: How old were you when you first smoked cigarettes everyday or almost everyday?

substance_tob_120.Description: During the past 12 months, how many cigarettes did you usually smoke in a day when you did smoke?

Levels.6: Less than one cigarette per day

substance_tob_080.Description: During the past 12 months, how often did you smoke a pipe or cigar

substance_tob_090.Description: How old were you when you first smoked a pipe or cigar everyday or almost everyday?

substance_tob_130.Description: During the past 12 months, about how many cigars or pipes did you usually smoke on a day when you did smoke?

Levels.1: 20 or more cigars or pipes a day
Levels.5: Less than one cigar or pipe a day

substance_tob_100.Description: During the past 12 months about how often did you chew tobacco or snuff?

substance_tob_110.Description: How old were you when you first chewed tobacco or snuff everyday or almost everyday?

substance_tob_140.Description: During the past 12 months, how many tins of chewing tobacco or snuff did you use each day when you did chew tobacco?

Levels.3: About a half a tin per day
Levels.4: Less than a half a tin per day
Levels.6: Less than one pinch per day

Levels.2: I have never tried alcohol, but might sometime
Levels.3: I have tried alcohol, but have not used in the past 12 months
Levels.4: I have tried alcohol, but have only used it once in a while in the past 12 months
Levels.5: I have used alcohol, and have used it a lot in the past 12 months

substance_alc_020.Description: Have you ever drank alcohol without your parents saying you could?

substance_alc_030.Description: How old were you when you first tried more alcohol than the small amount allowed by your parents?

substance_alc_050.Description: During the past 12 months, about how many times did you drink alcohol?

Levels.1: Every day or nearly every day

substance_alc_060.Description: How old were you when you first drank alcohol every day or nearly every day?

substance_alc_100.Description: In the past 12 months, when you drank alcohol, how many drinks did you usually have? A drink is a glass of wine, a bottle or can of beer, a shot glass of liquor, or a mixed drink.

substance_alc_110.Description: In the past 12 months, what is the largest number of drinks you had at one time? A drink is a glass of wine, a bottle or can of beer, a shot glass of liquor, or a mixed drink.

substance_alc_120.Description: Have you ever gotten drunk or high from alcohol?

substance_alc_130.Description: How old were you when you first got drunk or high from alcohol?

substance_alc_140.Description: Have you been drunk or high from alcohol in the past 12 months?

substance_alc_150.Description: In the past 12 months, when you drank how often did you drink enough to become high or drunk?

Levels.1: Nearly every time or every time
Levels.3: Less than half of the time

substance_alc_160.Description: How many times in the past 12 months have you been drunk?

Levels.1: Every day or nearly every day

substance_mar_010.Description: Have you ever used marijuana (grass) or hashish?

Levels.1: I have never tried marijuana or hashish
Levels.2: I have never tried marijuana or hashish, but might sometime
Levels.3: I have tried marijuana or hashish, but have not used it in the past 12 months
Levels.4: I have tried marijuana or hashish, but have used it only once in a while in the past 12 months
Levels.5: I have tried marijuana or hashish, and have used it a lot in the past 12 months

substance_mar_020.Description: How old were you when you first tried marijuana (grass) or hashish?

substance_mar_040.Description: During the past 12 months, about how often did you use marijuana or hashish?

Levels.1: Every day or nearly every day

substance_mar_050.Description: How old were you when you first smoked marijuana or hashish every day or nearly every day?

substance_mar_100___1.Description: How can you get marijuana or hashish? Select all that apply. [I could get some at home]

substance_mar_100___2.Description: How can you get marijuana or hashish? Select all that apply. [I could get some from one of my brothers]

substance_mar_100___3.Description: How can you get marijuana or hashish? Select all that apply. [I could get some from one of my sisters]

substance_mar_100___4.Description: How can you get marijuana or hashish? Select all that apply. [I could get some from friends]

substance_mar_100___5.Description: How can you get marijuana or hashish? Select all that apply. [I know where I could buy some]

substance_mar_100___6.Description: How can you get marijuana or hashish? Select all that apply. [I know an adult who will give me some]

substance_alcexp_yn01.Description: Earlier, you said you have used ALCOHOL. We would like to know what has happened to you when you have used alcohol. You will be shown some things that might happen when people use alcohol. For each one, decide whether it has ever happened to you. Was this something that has happened to me when I use alcohol? [I felt very mellow, calm, and happy]

substance_othr_010.Description: Have you used: Stimulants (uppers, speed, diet pills)?

Levels.2: Yes, but not in the last 12 months

substance_othr_012.Description: Did you take more than the doctor prescribed?

invalid_fake_drugs.LongName: Validity column of affirmative responses to fake drugs
invalid_fake_drugs.Description: Validity column that flags whether participants gave an affirmative response to fake drugs in items substance_othr_040 and substance_othr_050
